title: How is the FAR immune to instrumentality
display_title: How is the FAR immune to instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: How is the FAR "immune" to instrumentality?             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:25 am Really! Is the Room of Guf only applicable to Earth after a seed of life landed there? Because otherwise the souls of the first ancestral race, and every living being in the universe ends up washing up on Earth's shores afterwards. They have souls, otherwise where would have Adam and Lilith's souls came from?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:31 am The assumption is that Third Impact is a "localized" phenomenon. When it occurs, it doesn't affect the entire universe. Lilith's anti-AT Field probably doesn't extend past the planet Earth. Notice that when she's gathering souls, only ones on Earth go to the Black Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:46 am Lilith can instrumentalize only lifeforms derived from her. If there were any member of the FAR in the vicinity, they would be unscathed.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:46 am Yes, but she also takes souls out of the room of guf, doesn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:49 am Combs wrote: Yes, but she also takes souls out of the room of guf, doesn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:09 pm Yes, but she also takes souls out of the room of guf, doesn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:36 pm I believe it is a localized phenomena. Lilith only quantum-wanking her own children seems counter to what is suggested Adam can do to Lilith's children: if it's true that Adam could reset all of Earth, I would think Lilith could, too. And, as Aura says, GNR is more that just Lilith. Note that Lilith's chamber is empty. No more souls come out (until they've been sucked in), they apparently have all already been released. Ritsuko in ep 24 says, "There was nothing within the room of Gaff," I guess as a reason why all those Rei-fish have no souls. See other threads that seem to conclude that Lilith dispersed her souls into the general area where they kinda float around until getting used. Apparently you gotta be reproduced in a traditional way to get a soul. And, possibly, all Earthly creatures (maybe plants, too) have Lilith souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Aug 03, 2009 6:25 pm I'm sorry guys, I've failed. I thought there was only one room of guf because of what I looked into in Judaism. I also assumed that the room of guf was thiskind of parallel realm that can be accessed from anywhere in the universe. I've got the answer I needed. /thread

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Aug 05, 2009 8:05 am How the heck would plant life also be derived from lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2009 8:15 am soljerameelguy wrote: How the heck would plant life also be derived from lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:07 am interesting. Ive wondered if ALL seeds of life are either Black Seeds or White Seeds. DO they All look the same? Are there Seeds of Other Colors? What If Lilithkind ever encountered other Lilithkind? Would it be possible there would be an Adam like Seed but with qualites of Lilith(a Grey Seed)? what kind of interaction would occur incase for example that mars was where the grey seed landed, mars was inhabited, and when 3I occurs they decide to investigate. they arrive and the world has gone crapsack diled up to 11, and leave, eventually humanity gets back up on its feet and they return again. what wqould happen? Could real life Cydonia city of angels be where there moon landed?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:16 am Also what would happen if a seed landed on a planet that had life that wasn't derived from a seed? Would the Lillith-type or Adam-type organisms slowly take over, or would it only start producing life on an empty planet?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:42 am Neon Genesis Evangelion would happen. The Seed would produce Offspring to exterminate the life that was previously on thje planet.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 05, 2009 1:02 pm Soljer13 wrote: interesting. Ive wondered if ALL seeds of life are either Black Seeds or White Seeds. DO they All look the same? Are there Seeds of Other Colors? What If Lilithkind ever encountered other Lilithkind? Would it be possible there would be an Adam like Seed but with qualites of Lilith(a Grey Seed)? what kind of interaction would occur incase for example that mars was where the grey seed landed, mars was inhabited, and when 3I occurs they decide to investigate. they arrive and the world has gone crapsack diled up to 11, and leave, eventually humanity gets back up on its feet and they return again. what wqould happen? Could real life Cydonia city of angels be where there moon landed?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Aug 05, 2009 1:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: And, like what happened with Adam and Lilith, if a Seed lands on an already inhabited planet, it's Lance of Longinus would take it out so it didn't interfere.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:15 pm Shin-seiki wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: And, like what happened with Adam and Lilith, if a Seed lands on an already inhabited planet, it's Lance of Longinus would take it out so it didn't interfere.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:18 pm ^They are the first of something, the starting point of a certain kind of life form. Granted, they are the ancestors of both humans and angels, though (leaving out any other CI info right now because I'm too lazy to look it up) the SoLs they sent out were humanoid which strongly suggests their natural form is humanoid, too. In any case, there is no reason to demand that there can be no other (spontaneously occurring) races out there. To demand there can't be others is just as illogical as to demand that there must be. Both are in the realm of "we don't know and have no evidence to suggest one or the other." They're the first - of something - and perhaps others came later. What we can draw analogies with is the referenced material NGE uses. The "Fruits" (Knowledge and Life) come from pre-Christian, pre-Judaic myth-forms. They are the two components of Godhood, and there are no others. Based on the mythological roots, we can conclude that there are only these two fruits (though, of course, an author can choose to expand on the topic - there's just no evidence of such expansion in NGE or the source material). These "two Fruits" become famously associated with the Genesis account of Man's Fall. Again, there are just the two "Fruits". The Judaic descendent is not as developed in the NGE world, and it may be little more than a distraction to note that the Tree of Life reduces down to Asherah, which is a motif for both Wisdom personified as well as God's consort that bears his children (and perhaps, therefore, has also a connection to the Fruit of Life). So, from that brief background, it may be unreasonable to think there are other Fruits, and therefore other "kinds" of SoLs (if the chief diferentiator is the Fruit it bears); but it is not unreasonable to think there may be other non-FAR life, perhaps evolving after the FAR. Of course, we see nothing of it in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 05, 2009 7:29 pm If it fell out of her then it can go back in and if not then they are fine. Simple as that....Well..I don't know, maybe the ATF does effect more but I'm not sure.

Because otherwise the souls of the first ancestral race, and every living being in the universe ends up washing up on Earth's shores afterwards. They have souls, otherwise where would have Adam and Lilith's souls came from?
